description: The Hero search bar currently only filters 9 hardcoded page names. Transform it into a real global search that indexes all site content: people (Christine, Andrew, Daniel, etc.), topics/tags (liberal arts, AI, community), concepts (Fractal U, Maximum New York, Golden Age Protocol), Lab documents (essays, podcasts, talks), and houses/sectors. Users should be able to type any keyword and get relevant results across all content types, with results grouped by category and navigable via keyboard.
title: Global search across people, topics, documents, and concepts
